# Model Card

Originate from the [@Mitchell_2019]
[Google's Model Card](https://modelcards.withgoogle.com/about). This is scientists' attempt to bring transparency, fairness and equity to other stakeholders that are affected by AI models. Two specific examples that serve as a template are:  

 * [Face Detection](https://modelcards.withgoogle.com/face-detection)  
 * [Object Detection](https://modelcards.withgoogle.com/object-detection)

Although we have pre-defined template in [Python](https://github.com/tensorflow/model-card-toolkit) and [example](https://www.googlenewsapp.com/using-model-card-toolkit-for-tf-model-transparency/), and [deploy](https://cloud.google.com/blog/products/ai-machine-learning/create-a-model-card-with-scikit-learn), there doesn't seem to be one in R
